title: SpaceCraft
description: A space-themed texture pack, offering clean graphics, cosmic colors, and a seamless interface, designed for an optimal PvP and Survival gaming experience.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b0feaa4843fa70539969c4b98b54b97caef59e0.jpeg)

SpaceCraft is a clean 16x texture pack built around a space aesthetic while keeping Minecraft readable and comfortable to play.

## 🌌 Space-Inspired Visuals
- Blocks recolored with cosmic tones and soft contrasts
- Star-like highlights and darker materials for better depth perception
- Clear shapes preserved for easy recognition during gameplay

## 🗡️ PvP Friendly Elements
- Short swords to improve field of view
- Readable particles and effects during fights
- Important blocks remain easy to identify in combat situations

## 💠 Transparent Interface
- Transparent inventory and UI elements
- Cleaner screen visibility while exploring or fighting

## 🌍 Lightweight & Playable Everywhere
- Standard 16x resolution
- Designed for performance and compatibility
- Playable in both PvP and Survival without visual overload

SpaceCraft focuses on atmosphere while staying practical to use.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9eaee51786292945e09fc644f77b6a4cd4bc4ff.jpeg)
